output.title: Landlord Withholding Your Security Deposit? Here’s How to Get It Back in 60 Seconds
output.meta_description: Frustrated your landlord won't return your deposit? Learn your tenant rights and send a legally sound demand letter in 60 seconds for $19.99—no sign-up required.
content_outline: Why Landlords Wrongfully Withhold Security Deposits (and What They Can Legally Deduct)
Tenant Rights 101: State Timelines, Normal Wear and Tear, and Illegal Deductions
The Power of a Demand Letter: A Faster, Cheaper Alternative to Small Claims Court
5 Viral TikTok / Reel Hooks to Expose Bad Landlords and Reclaim Your Cash
Step-by-Step: How Deposits-Back.com Sends Your Security Deposit Dispute Letter in 60 Seconds
key_points: POV: You left the apartment spotless and your landlord ghosted you with your $2,000 security deposit—here's the 60-second fix.
My landlord tried to deduct 'cleaning fees' for normal wear and tear. I didn't hire a lawyer; I used a $19.99 demand letter instead.
If your landlord hasn't returned your deposit within your state's legal timeline, they may already owe you double damages—act now.
Stop scrolling and start demanding: no subscription, no sign-up, just a professional security deposit dispute letter sent instantly.
Tenant rights matter, but action gets results. A formal letter of demand is often all it takes to make landlords pay up.
output.cta: Demand your deposit back now in 60 seconds for $19.99 at Deposits-Back.com—no sign-up, no subscription, just results.
output.target_audience: Frustrated US renters dealing with landlords withholding, deducting from, or refusing to return security deposits who need a fast, affordable legal solution without hiring an attorney.
